metadata.title: Minecraft Block Trivia Corpus
metadata.description: Corpus of 100 Minecraft blocks with properties and trivia hooks, sourced from PrismarineJS/minecraft-data + minecraft.wiki
metadata.note: Phase A corpus (100 blocks). Mechanical/special properties from minecraft-data; generation fields (Y-level/biome/rarity) scraped from wiki prose -- spot-check recommended.

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the minimum tool tier required to mine Stone?
What is the blast resistance of Stone?
True or False: Stone is renewable.
What is the minimum tool tier required to mine Cobblestone?
What is the blast resistance of Cobblestone?
True or False: Cobblestone is renewable.

True or False: Bamboo Mosaic is renewable.
